description_long: This is a tall, pentagonal corner cabinet with a modern design, featuring a combination of light wood and white paneling. The front face displays two vertically aligned doors with six rectangular black glass or opaque panels, giving it a contemporary look. The side panels are mostly plain, with one side showing a vertical white accent and the other side fully white. The top and sides are finished in a light wood grain, while the back is designed to fit snugly into a corner. The cabinet appears to be constructed primarily from engineered wood, with glass or acrylic inserts on the doors. Its structure suggests it is intended for storage, likely in a kitchen, hallway, or garage setting.
description: A tall, pentagonal corner cabinet with light wood and white finishes, featuring two front doors with black glass or opaque panels.
description_view_0: This view shows a side of the cabinet with a vertical white accent panel on a wood grain background.
description_view_1: This view displays a plain white side panel with a wood grain top, showing the cabinet's depth.
description_view_2: This is the front view, highlighting two doors with six black glass or opaque panels set in a light wood frame.
description_view_3: This view reveals another side with a tall white accent panel on a wood grain background, similar to view 0 but mirrored.
